segments.text: O God, do not keep silence; do not hold your peace or be still, O God!
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: For behold, your enemies make an uproar; those who hate you have raised their heads.
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: They lay crafty plans against your people; they consult together against your treasured ones.
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: They say, 'Come, let us wipe them out as a nation; let the name of Israel be remembered no more!'
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: For they conspire with one accord; against you they make a covenant—
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: the tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites, Moab and the Hagrites,
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: Gebal and Ammon and Amalek, Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: Assyria also has joined them; they are the strong arm of the children of Lot. Selah
segments.speaker: Asaph

footnotes: holpen: Heb. been an arm to

segments.text: Do to them as you did to Midian, as to Sisera and Jabin at the river Kishon,
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: who were destroyed at En-dor, who became dung for the ground.
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna,
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: who said, 'Let us take possession for ourselves of the pastures of God.'
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: O my God, make them like whirling dust, like chaff before the wind.
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: As fire consumes the forest, as the flame sets the mountains ablaze,
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: so may you pursue them with your tempest and terrify them with your hurricane!
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: Fill their faces with shame, that they may seek your name, O Lord.
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: Let them be put to shame and dismayed forever; let them perish in disgrace,
segments.speaker: Asaph

segments.text: that they may know that you alone, whose name is the Lord, are the Most High over all the earth.
segments.speaker: Asaph
